data.title: Implement resolve_scalar_trailers in apply-attribution-trailers.sh
data.description: Implement resolve_scalar_trailers([task-id]) in plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh. Uses PATH-resolved .claude/scripts/dso ticket show to traverse parent chain for DSO-Task, DSO-Story, DSO-Epic, Jira-Ticket. Reads $ARTIFACTS_DIR/reviewer-findings.json for DSO-Review-Score. Emits --trailer 'Key: value' per non-empty scalar. Test isolation: tests prepend a mock bin/ dir to PATH containing a dso script that echoes fixture ticket JSON (use printf to create the mock, chmod +x). AC: (1) task-id with parent story + grandparent epic (mocked via PATH) -> DSO-Task/Story/Epic flags; (2) reviewer-findings.json with score -> DSO-Review-Score flag; (3) no context -> empty output; (4) all T4-test tests pass; (5) validate.sh --ci passes.
